description.ko: AURA-7은 디지털 건축과 자연스러운 유동성 사이의 경계를 탐구하며, 유기적 생명체의 우아함과 함께 맥동하는 리드미컬하고 살아있는 에너지를 시각화합니다.
description.en: AURA-7 explores the boundary between digital architecture and natural fluidity, manifesting as a rhythmic, living energy that pulses with the grace of organic life.

prompt: Cinematic macro shot of AURA-7, an ethereal entity of organic flow, swirling liquid silk and translucent bioluminescent membranes, rhythmic undulating patterns resembling cellular growth, soft golden and violet gradients, hyper-detailed textures, 8k resolution, serene atmospheric lighting.
